reasoning: To cross both arms over the chest, I need to rotate the left arm outward with Joint1 and pitch it upward with Joint2, keeping the wrist angled inward to rest on the chest. For the right arm, I need to rotate it outward with Joint1, positioning it slightly above the left arm, and pitch it upward with Joint2 to complete the crossed-arm position. The wrists are rotated inward to lay flat against the chest. This pose indicates stubbornness or closed-off emotions and can be used for emojis like 😠 or 🤨.
